priority: MessagePack extension primitive value compatibility slice
scope: Null, boolean, integer, float, byte string, packed array, and mixed array encoding
Primitive MessagePack string, binary, list, and map decoding with PHP int/string array keys
non_scope: Object serialization hooks and incomplete object restoration
Reference identity and cyclic structure preservation
MessagePack class constants and object API methods
Redis and Memcached serializer option integration
target_gates: nix develop -c cargo test -p php_runtime msgpack --no-fail-fast
nix develop -c cargo test -p php_std msgpack --no-fail-fast
next_step: Promote upstream PECL msgpack PHPTs once object/reference semantics and Redis/Memcached serializer integration are implemented.
